Swordahls Grimoire

ꀸꍏꀤ꒒ꌩ ꆰꀎꍟꌗ꓄ ꌗꂦꈤꁅ *ꋪꍟꎇꋪꍟꌗꃅꍟꌗ ꀤꈤ 24 ꃅꂦꀎꋪꌗ*

Rumination (rune-immitation) involves repetitive thinking or dwelling on negative feelings and distress and their causes and consequences. This is important to recognize because i almost stayed in a loop of this for a long time. i call that the dungeon, you know how to beat the dungeon (edit feb23  just dont drod out)

my mother was an interesting individual. What i know and what i remember of her was that when she saw me she would always be very loving and excited to see me ages 6-13. before any of the bad parts i remember her making music on her piano and recording. and would say sometimes katorshka which is russian word for potatoe when we would get fast food fries. i heard she eventually became scared of water my sister said. which i spoke to my sister recently we caught up on 7 years of life in 20 min. they are both in the lore, but here you can see my moms old channel https://www.youtube.com/@TheSandramoor

♡♡

Sentia | EP6  Ch1
 Meeting At The Crown Citadelian 

Enters in Swordahl, cloak touching the floor dungeon shard gauntlets glowing slightly. "this place smells like sentian" His buddy Maldrakoux, slightly disheveled looking but with a faint grin laughs "taaaake it in dahl.. this is the HEAD of the beast jajajajajjaw" you could tell he enjoyed the smell of a thousand merchants stinking ... just as bad as the delrox meat they sell. The two had finally arrived at the Citadelian City. Years together in the dungeon just to track down one merchant... they both were feeling the uncertainty of the situation but both thought they sure as sent werent gonna be the first one to break. Swordahl was quiet but breathing heavily, it almost looked like he was struggling. Maldrakouxs looks at him and snickers. " jjawjaja, we've come a long way JUST goin off the word of your dead old man.. NOW what? " Swordahl says nothing... He grabs the grimoire strapped to his leg and unbuckles it, Flipping to page 77. "Tracking spell" .. he says.. still looking through the runes until he was interrupted by a tug on his cloak. A smaller elven girl with white hair and eyes that seemed to have the blankest stare but at the same time hold a thousand stories.
